name: ExtensionObservationDefinition_Device
title: R5: Measurement device or model of device (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ObservationDefinition.device` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ObservationDefinition.device` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ObservationDefinition.device` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DeviceDefinition,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ObservationDefinition.device` has a context of ObservationDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ObservationDefinition`.
Element `ObservationDefinition.device` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Measurement device or model of device (new)
element.comment:
Element `ObservationDefinition.device` has a context of ObservationDefinition based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ObservationDefinition`.
Element `ObservationDefinition.device` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
When multiple occurrences of device are present, they are to be combined with a logical OR: at least one of the specified devices is used to produce the observation.

element.short: Measurement device or model of device
element.definition: The measurement model of device or actual device used to produce observations of this type.
element.comment: When multiple occurrences of device are present, they are to be combined with a logical OR: at least one of the specified devices is used to produce the observation.
